message:
test(proptest): add 3 property tests for OnErrorCassHintsLookup serde roundtrip (ft-2l9kn)

Also fixes pre-existing compilation issue: DeviceAuthStepOutcome import and tests
are now properly gated behind #[cfg(feature = "browser")] since the type is
feature-gated in handlers.rs.
